title: Snapshot Bubbles
description: You are trapped in a desertic dimension and need to clone Overworld chunks in order to escape.
body:
![Snapshot Bubbles title with the Desert dimension in the background](https://i.postimg.cc/VLp8pSbb/Title-Card.webp)

## Important Notes
**/!\ MAKE SURE TO DOWNLOAD THE RESOURCE PACK THAT IS INCLUDED IN EACH VERSION /!\\**

**/!\ BECAUSE THIS DATAPACK USES EXPERIMENTAL SETTINGS, IT IS BEST TO QUIT AND REJOIN THE WORLD WHEN UPDATING THE PACK /!\\**

This datapack was originally created in 8 days for the *IMAGEination Datapack Jam* on PMC.

## Description
### Concept:
_You are trapped in a desertic dimension. The only way to escape is to craft a Pocket portal which lets you travel between the Desert and the Overworld. In order to craft it, you need ressources that can only be found in the Overworld, so you need to use Snapshot bubbles to take "snapshots" of Overworld chunks and place them in the Desert._

For now, all the documentation is on its [PCM Page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/snapshot-bubbles/).
